creator: russo@bogodyn.org
text:

/bin/mkdir -p /usr/ports/graphics/qt5-3d/work/qt3d-opensource-src-5.6.1

src-5.6.1/.qmake.cache
echo 'QMAKE_LIBDIR_FLAGS = -L/usr/ports/graphics/qt5-3d/work/qt3d-opensource-src
-5.6.1/lib' >> /usr/ports/graphics/qt5-3d/work/qt3d-opensource-src-5.6.1/.qmake.
